response_preview: {"type": "transform", "code": "med_w = df['water'].median(); df.loc[df['water'] > med_w * 8, 'water'] /= 10; df.loc[(df['water'] > 0) & (df['water'] < med_w / 8), 'water'] *= 10\nmed_c = df['cement'].median(); df.loc[df['cement'] > med_c * 8, 'cement'] /= 10; df.loc[(df['cement'] > 0) & (df['cement'] < med_c / 8), 'cement'] *= 10"}

action_content:
med_w = df['water'].median(); df.loc[df['water'] > med_w * 8, 'water'] /= 10; df.loc[(df['water'] > 0) & (df['water'] < med_w / 8), 'water'] *= 10
med_c = df['cement'].median(); df.loc[df['cement'] > med_c * 8, 'cement'] /= 10; df.loc[(df['cement'] > 0) & (df['cement'] < med_c / 8), 'cement'] *= 10
